requirements: IRS tax information sharing consent required

scholarship_universe.description: Morgan State's centralized scholarship application portal

uncf.name: UNCF Scholarships
uncf.description: United Negro College Fund scholarships for students at HBCUs

collegeBound.name: CollegeBound Foundation
collegeBound.description: Scholarships available for Baltimore City students

financial_aid_types.grants: Free money that doesn't need to be repaid (Federal Pell Grant, Maryland State Grants)
financial_aid_types.scholarships: Merit or need-based awards that don't require repayment
financial_aid_types.work_study: Part-time employment program for students with financial need
financial_aid_types.loans: Borrowed money that must be repaid (Federal Direct Loans, PLUS Loans)

satisfactory_academic_progress.description: Students must maintain Satisfactory Academic Progress (SAP) to remain eligible for financial aid
requirements: Complete at least 67% of attempted credit hours
Complete degree within 150% of program length
satisfactory_academic_progress.appeals: SAP appeals can be submitted through the Financial Aid office
